untranslatable_reason: The signal requires pattern recognition (dual bump identification with first and second bump comparison) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/indicator-based operators. The '20% occurrence frequency' is also a statistical property that cannot be encoded as a real-time trading condition.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate with price action logic (higher high followed by lower close), but this does not capture the true 'dual bump' pattern structure described in the source material. The pattern requires identifying two distinct peak formations and comparing their magnitudes—a capability beyond the allowed indicator set. Manual pattern recognition or custom indicator would be required.
